prompt: Create a bright square VTuber “good morning” social media frame in a soft anime watercolor style, with a wide open center-right area of clear blue sky for placing a character or photo. The scene is a cheerful spring morning landscape viewed from a leafy garden: sunlit green branches and small white blossoms frame the top-left and left edge, with glowing lens flare, drifting petals, white feathers, and scattered green leaves across the sky. Add exactly 7 birds: 3 small birds perched on a flowering branch at left-middle, colored blue, white, and yellow; 3 birds perched on a rustic wooden sign at bottom-left, a brown sparrow, a pale yellow cockatiel with orange cheeks, and a blue budgerigar; and 1 swallow flying in the upper-right sky. In the upper-left, place elegant white hand-lettered script reading Good Morning!, decorated with tiny leaves and sparkles, with a teal ribbon underneath containing the Japanese text 素敵な一日になりますように♪. At the bottom-left, make a weathered wooden plank sign wrapped with small flowers, vines, a white laurel motif, and a feather, with white script text Bind Week and a smaller date line 5.10 (Sat) - 5.16 (Fri). The background should show a soft distant town, lake or river, and pale mountains under fluffy white clouds, with daisies and yellow flowers blooming in the lower-right foreground. Use a fresh pastel palette, airy composition, high detail, gentle sunlight, clean decorative typography, and leave the center of the sky mostly uncluttered for overlay use.
